_readme: Update p95 values after each stable run using update_baseline.ps1. null = no baseline yet (check skipped). NOTE: baselines reflect GitHub Actions runner latency (US-east to Mumbai ~+180ms vs local).

smoke.note: CI baseline: 269ms from GitHub Actions (US runner -> Mumbai server). Local was 81ms.

load.note: Updated 2026-06-09 from actual 250-VU run (6476 iters, 0.09% errors, 99 req/s)

stress.note: Updated 2026-06-11 from CI run (p95=12.71s, 29% errors at 1000 VUs). CI runner US->Mumbai adds latency vs local 10.3s.

spike.note: Updated 2026-06-09 from actual 800-VU spike run (26.47% errors at peak, 4221 iters)

soak.note: Updated 2026-06-09 from actual 60-min run (0.00% errors, 100% checks, 310874 reqs, 8.8 GB)

scalability.note: Updated 2026-06-09 from actual 7-step run (degrades above ~300 VUs; 48.8% errors at 750-1000 VU steps)
